concerns: Step 2 defines a unified UserPreferences interface and validatePreferences function, but Steps 3-4 use individual useLocalStorage calls per key. Reconcile by having Step 2 export per-field validators (validateRoute, validateTiers) instead of a monolithic schema.
Persisting searchQuery may be surprising UX — users often expect search to be cleared on revisit. Consider making this opt-in or omitting it if user testing shows friction.
useLocalStorage hook must handle environments where localStorage throws on access (not just on read/parse) — e.g., Safari private browsing throws on setItem when quota is 0.
